notes: PLACEHOLDER FLOORS — not yet recorded. This baseline is report_only until the first keyed run on the production verifier model. To activate: run `python tasks.py evals semantic -- --model gpt-4o-mini --limit 200`, read the summary, set each floor a few points below the observed value (leaving the tolerance band for run-to-run noise), set recorded_at, and flip enforcement to "enforce". The floors below are the minimum bar a verification product should clear, not a measurement.
